title: Hiring Medical Officer at Bombay Hospital

jsonLd.title: Hiring Medical Officer at Bombay Hospital
jsonLd.description:
Bombay Hospital, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Medical Officer for our Dhanbad operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Bombay Hospital:
Bombay Hospital is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in Wound Care

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual performance appraisal
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Bombay Hospital!
